visual_description: A medium shot shows a man with short, dark hair, wearing a blue and black plaid shirt over a white t-shirt. He is looking down intently, fiddling with a small, dark object in his hands. The setting appears to be an apartment, with a wooden door marked "123" visible in the background, along with a framed picture on the wall. White, handwritten-style text appears on the screen, reading, "CO-EXECUTIVE PRODUCER" on the top line and "TODD STEVENS" on the bottom. The camera remains steady. The audio begins with the sound of rustling, like someone handling a small, delicate object. A man speaks in a low, slightly exasperated voice, his tone filled with confusion and a hint of annoyance as he asks, "What is this?" The camera angle shifts to a slightly different medium shot, now showing the man in the plaid shirt interacting with another man who is wearing a pink and white plaid shirt. The man in pink looks at the other man with a concerned and slightly confused expression, gesturing with his hands as if questioning what he's holding.
